item.title: Take notes U.S., this is how you hold large corporations accountable.
item.description: The #EU has issued its first fine against #Apple over an investigation into allegations the tech-giant shut out #music-streaming rivals, including #Spotify on its platforms. The European Commission also ordered Apple to stop preventing music-streaming #apps from informing users of cheaper deals away from the #appstore
item.dc:creator: DarthPutinKGB

item.title: The 412th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps
item.description:
My correction at the bottom
Mood
Ope. Already failed.
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild *every other* Monday-Friday around 11:30 am, GMT-5, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral.
But consider this: BABY COCAINE
Hell yeah
Dragons
This one is a reference for Landscape orientations
Still a better love story than Twilight
Me
This is my newly commissioned Signature Image, by Dark Arts Studios. He's no longer on The Imgurs, I met him on ElbowDeepInAHorse's Discord Server. Here's where you can see his work: https://twitter.com/Anubis23342060 https://www.furaffinity.net/user/thed4rk1ord/ https://tailsofthegods.com/ https://dark-arts.itch.io/ FUN TIP / LIFE FACT / PRO HACK I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten @CodyBurkett @OhValleyOfPlenty @AbbiiStabbii @DigiT00l @MemeMuseumCurator @CeleryMan7 @DumpsterKoala @JebidiahBeetus @Kaeldra @KirbyVictorious @HermioneDanger00 @DumpReview @WhiskeyJelly @JasonPositivityPilot @danat101 @PotatoCheesMonk @VanessaNelson @NotMuchBiggerThanAWomprat @MindNumbingBraIncAndy @TheMellowMoron @TheWoodsAreVile @ThatOtherGirlYouKnow @IStealMemesAndStuff @DrWalters @DaymanAhAAAAah Lemme know If you are a Regular Dumper and would like to be added to the list! Archive Of Previous Dumps: Vols 1-300: https://imgur.com/a/vAfF9Wz Vols 301+ : https://imgur.com/a/oDakPaq Updated Whenever I Can Get Around To It #MemeDump #Phone_Dump #Dump #MeeMays #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #SaveTheBees #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #EatingAppsTakingNaps #EatNamesAndTakeAss #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #IfYoureDeadInside #DumpyMcGeeAndGuyNamedSteve #2Dumps1Site #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple

item.dc:creator: dizzyturtle

item.title: Executives learning the wrong lesson in 3,2,1..
item.description: https://www.pcgamer.com/gaming-industry/warner-bros-aims-to-increase-focus-on-free-to-play-and-live-service-games-because-disappointments-like-suicide-squad-make-the-big-budget-business-very-volatile/ Tldr, SSKTJL was a flop, so f2p cash grab games it is! The sad part is that WB mentions the success of hogwarts legacy and compares the big success and this game's failure to a high/low cycle and that's why they want f2p because it gives consistent revenue... I wonder if they ever considered that hogwarts legacy succeeded so immensely because it was a fun to play game without the micro transaction bullshit, whereas the suicide squad game is a boring, grindy looter shooter, with micro transactions.... If the game was good, it'd have made money. But yeah of course making f2p games is cheaper and easier and you can prey on people's gambling habits and / or idiots that spend thousands on digital bling bling dopamine hits /whether they can afford it or not)... So WB going that route means there won't likely be any decent LOTR, DC, or Nethetrealm games for the forseable future, but rather a slew of pachinko machines with a batman skins, woooooo!
item.dc:creator: Killerpixler

item.title: Guess how much this cost in March 1978
item.description: Quit smoking on 3-5-78. That's 46 friggin years if my math is right. Yes I'm old. I bought my last pack of cigarettes for 55 or 60 cents. When I first started smoking they were around 25 -30 cents a pack. If you went in to and around Richmond you could get cartons (in bulk) for around $2 a carton. Each year my SO and I celebrate this anniversary. We usually co-cook an Italian meal and split a bottle of wine. Tonight will be no exception. If you have quit, you need to celebrate that date. If you forgot the date, make one up and celebrate it with your favorite person/people. Here's how I quit. https://imgur.com/gallery/LXwlPRf
item.dc:creator: CT1space3DX

item.title: Images of Note: bedpilled
item.description:
uwu
HECK
no thoughts, head empty
Well fuck you medieval dudes! I would wear dresses more often if they had pockets. There is literally no single joy greater than finding a dress with pockets.
saaaaaaaaaaaame
The Inquisition: "YOU HAVE THE TAINT OF KHAOS!"
lorj
https://www.mozilla.org/en-GB/firefox/new/
Yeah
hell yes
aaaaaaaaaaaaaaa
The Unknown could actually work as a villain to be honest.
COLLIES ARE SUCH GOOD DOGS!
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay

item.title: Dog-to-door sales
item.description: That's Jonny Devaney. You've seen him before.
item.dc:creator: TheOneWhoWasLeft

item.title: My heart is broken. May you rest in peace Jack...
item.description: My darling Jack passed away today. I rescued him as a kitten. He's been with me through the worst of my depression. He would crawl under the covers with me and cuddle. He was such a kind and gentle soul. And will be incredibly missed... May he rest in kitty heaven with all the treats his tummy can handle.
item.dc:creator: Scrumptiousassumptions
